name: codera-multi-repo-project-template
description: Full-stack multi-repo project with orchestrator, shared types, frontend, backend, agent, and dashboard. Includes CodeArtifact package sharing, EventBridge build ordering, and Claude Code agent coordination.

variables.label: Project Name
variables.description: Short lowercase identifier used in repo names, resource names, and npm scope

variables.label: Project Description
variables.description: Short human-readable description of the project
variables.default: A multi-repo project created from the Codera template

variables.label: Dashboard Auth Key
variables.description: Pre-shared key for dashboard CloudFront Function authentication

repositories.name: {{PROJECT_NAME}}-orchestrator
repositories.description: Architecture, tasks, and coordination — Claude Code agent hub

repositories.name: {{PROJECT_NAME}}-shared-types
repositories.description: Shared TypeScript interfaces — publishes to CodeArtifact
